But that's just a little bit harder, I feel, because then we would have to make multiple, multiple pages that are customized and make sure they're all functioning and fine.

But, sorry, a little off topic, but that's why like the hard version, because we could just proofread it before we print it and then it can ship right to them and we don't have to deal with as many malfunctions, hopefully.

But this is what I was thinking.

If we do the pop, the planner slash notebook calendar journal, whatever you want to call it, and then link it.

Oh, and then we can start running odds on, like, Pinterest and Google and Etsy.

Or even like Amazon's free, right?

And we would just have to do the search in SEOs and we would be at the top.

But then I'm almost tomorrow I'm filming my web class for my funnel and landing page for the business side of things.

And then that's good enough for right now.

And then I'm going to focus on the waterside and finishing the spiral in the map.
